Coming soon · Woolloongabba, Brisbane · Opening 2027

R.I.S.E. College is hiring. Be there from day one.

R.I.S.E. College is looking for passionate, purpose-driven educators to help shape a new school from the ground up. We open in Woolloongabba, Brisbane in January 2027. Right now, we're building the team that will make it happen.

The opportunity

The opportunity

R.I.S.E. College isn't a school looking for someone to maintain the status quo. We're a new kind of school, being built from scratch, with a clear philosophy, strong community backing and a founding team that believes education can do better for young people who have been let down by traditional systems.

This is a rare chance to join at the very beginning. To help design the culture, shape the curriculum and lead a school that puts young people first. Not in theory. In practice, every day.

We're currently recruiting for our Founding Principal. Additional teaching and support roles will follow.

About R.I.S.E. College

About R.I.S.E. College

R.I.S.E. College is a Special Assistance School for young people aged 14 to 18 who are disengaged from, or disadvantaged within, mainstream education. We're founded by CoAct, a community services organisation with deep roots in supporting young Australians to thrive.

R.I.S.E. stands for Resilience, Identity, Skills and Engagement. These aren't just words on a wall: they're the framework for everything we do, how we teach, how we support students and how we measure success.

We're located in Woolloongabba, Brisbane, and we open our doors on 27 January 2027.

Opening 27 January 2027
Current vacancies

Current vacancies

Founding Principal

R.I.S.E. College, Woolloongabba Brisbane · Full time · Commencing 2027

This is a founding leadership role. You'll work closely with the R.I.S.E. College Board to finalise the school's operational model, recruit and lead the founding staff team and prepare R.I.S.E. College for its first intake of students in January 2027.

Applications open: 27 July 2026
Applications close: Monday 24 August 2026, 5pm AEST
